_meta.source: GSC coverage export 2026-07-14 (sitewide indexing collapse to 67 pages; ~21 tools indexed per 6/25 export) + audit/DeftBrain_Tool_Evaluation.xlsx ratings + search-demand review
_meta.policy: The union of `focus` + `keepers` is the INDEXABLE tool set: these appear in sitemap-app.xml and get no robots meta. Every other tool stays fully live for users, but is dropped from the sitemap and gets <meta name="robots" content="noindex"> in its prerendered HTML. To re-release a tool (drip, once the focus set is indexed): add its ID to `focus` and rebuild. Consumed by scripts/generate-sitemap.js, scripts/prerender.js, and scripts/check-sitemap-urls.js (which enforces sitemap-vs-noindex consistency).
_meta.focus_criteria: The 18 bets: most unique, deepest, or targeting terms people actually search for. Chosen 2026-07-14.
_meta.keepers_criteria: Already indexed per the GSC 6/25 export (minus the two that are also in focus) — never throw away a win. ContrastReport/DebateMe map to their renamed IDs WhichLife/ArgueBetter.
